name: Qwen2.5
metaDescription: Qwen2.5 (Alibaba (Qwen)), released 2024-09 — part of the Qwen (open-weight) line. Widely-adopted open generation: dense 0.5B/1.5B/3B/7B/14B/32B/72B with longer…
overview: Qwen2.5 is a large language model from Alibaba (Qwen), part of the Qwen (open-weight) line. Released 2024-09. The flagship open-weight (Apache 2.0) family spanning edge-sized dense models to large MoE models, covering general text, reasoning and agentic use.
What's notable in this version: Widely-adopted open generation: dense 0.5B/1.5B/3B/7B/14B/32B/72B with longer context and stronger coding/math than Qwen2.
